name: Markdown → Confluence Pages (Create or Update, Multi-Page)

parameters.jsCode:
const prev = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { apiBody: prev.confBody, method: 'POST', url: $env.CONFLUENCE_BASE_URL + '/wiki/rest/api/content', title: prev.title, pageId: '', isUpdate: false, pageIndex: prev.pageIndex } }];
